base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of player_fighter_idle — a character (boss) from 1981 galaga. White/red Galaxian-style player ship — single static sprite, always faces up. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: White/red Galaxian-style player ship — single static sprite, always faces up; only moves horizontally along bottom edge. Appears multiple times in sheet in different color-highlight states (idle, firing, captured-by-boss-galaga state, dual-fighter merge state)
